headline: Western Gateway Extension Puts Phillips 66 Valuation And Momentum In Focus
summary: Phillips 66 (NYSE:PSX) and Kinder Morgan extended the open season for their Western Gateway Pipeline project, which targets refined product deliveries into the Los Angeles market. The extension signals continued interest from shippers in securing capacity on the proposed pipeline. The project focuses on expanding refined product transportation infrastructure serving one of the largest fuel markets in the United States. Phillips 66, trading at around $176.21, has seen strong recent share...
